category_title: Students with severe hearing impairment and EAL who use physical gesture to demonstrate understanding
scenario_title: Collaborative group work and reading aloud
minimal_context: The student is working in a collaborative group to read aloud scripts from A Midsummer Night's Dream.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Please get into your collaborative groups and start reading your scripts for A Midsummer Night's Dream.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: sometime um there are people that they are don’t take the [cope]

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's just focus on the script for now. It is your turn to read the next part.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Stays very quiet, points to the script, and writes down exactly one sentence on his paper instead of speaking.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to read the lines aloud to the class, not just write them down. Go ahead and speak.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Attempts to read the Shakespearean text aloud to the class but has great difficulty with pronouncing words, resulting in very basic verbal communication that is hard to understand.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Please get into your collaborative groups and start reading your scripts for A Midsummer Night's Dream.

STUDENT: sometime um there are people that they are don’t take the [cope]

TUTOR: Let's just focus on the script for now. It is your turn to read the next part.

STUDENT: (Stays very quiet, points to the script, and writes down exactly one sentence on his paper instead of speaking.)

TUTOR: You need to read the lines aloud to the class, not just write them down. Go ahead and speak.

STUDENT: (Attempts to read the Shakespearean text aloud to the class but has great difficulty with pronouncing words, resulting in very basic verbal communication that is hard to understand.)

task.content: Collaborative group work and independently reading and acting scripts from A Midsummer Night's Dream

context.materials: Scripts, text of A Midsummer Night's Dream, resources provided by teacher to access language
context.social_setting: Collaborative groups and reading aloud to the class
context.time_context: During the five project-based research lessons (R1-R5)

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: When reading the text aloud to the class
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Has great difficulty with pronouncing words

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Expresses dislike for group work due to peer dynamics
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Dislikes drama/group work because of how peers cope
related_quotes: sometime um there are people that they are don’t take the [cope]
